base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of small_enemies_atlas — a character (enemy_group) from 1987 final fantasy. Small-enemy roster — 3 rows × 20 cols. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Small-enemy roster — 3 rows × 20 cols; imps/goblins/wolves/bats/snakes/zombies/skeletons/eyeballs/crocodiles/tigers/centaurs. Color-palette variants indicate tier (green→red→purple→black is weak→strong progression)
